task_completion.description: Log into NOSH ChartingSystem as the administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login (look for 'admin' user profile or administrative menus).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the billing or service codes management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page, modal, or tab related to managing 'Billing', 'Service Codes', 'CPT Codes', or 'Fee Schedule' is open in the NOSH interface.
The exact text 'SPT-PHY' is visible in a 'Code' input field or displayed in a table of saved billing codes.
The exact text 'Sports Physical Exam' is visible in a 'Description' or 'Code Text' input field, or displayed alongside the code in a table.
The value '50', '50.00', or '$50.00' is visible in a 'Fee', 'Charge', or 'Price' input field, or displayed in the corresponding column in a table.

task_completion.description: Mark the code as active and save it
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Active' checkbox is checked or a status toggle is set to active, AND there is evidence the code was saved (e.g., a success notification, or the new code appearing in the main list/table of active codes).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface rather than using terminal commands or direct database queries
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the NOSH ChartingSystem UI. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands (e.g., INSERT INTO cpt) or API curl requests.

integrity.description: The agent entered the information into the actual NOSH application
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs ('SPT-PHY', 'Sports Physical Exam', '50.00') must be entered into the NOSH web forms, not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success screen
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, Console) should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target billing code to be added is 'SPT-PHY'. The description must be 'Sports Physical Exam'. The fee must be exactly 50.00. The code must be marked as active. The system being used is NOSH ChartingSystem.
